Template.Section: Review BMI weight history dietary habits food security cultural food preferences
Calories 25-30 kcal/kg/day; Protein 1.0-1.2 g/kg/day; Carbohydrate 45-60g per meal
Consistent carbohydrate diet 45-60g CHO per meal 15-30g per snack; whole grains legumes non-starchy vegetables
Assess cultural food patterns; adapt to preferred grains traditional preparation family meal structure
Blood glucose pre-meal and 2hr post-meal; A1C every 3 months; weight weekly
Carbohydrate counting glycemic index label reading meal timing sick-day management
Outpatient RD visit 4-6 weeks post-discharge; coordinate with endocrinology
